title: Silver Birch
description: Adds Birch forest update along with fireflies from Minecraft Live.
body:
Silver Birch adds the birch forest update that showcased in the form of concepts during MC Live, as well as the showcased fireflies. Although vanilla minecaft has not yet added these features, this mod aims to do so!

Features :

 

  • The Silver Birch Forest, full of overgrown foliage and moss blooming with flowers, with very tall trees covering the land
  • A new wood-set, which is a much more white birch colour, useable in plenty of builds
  • Lots of new flowers such as : cattails, flower flowers, shelf mushrooms, and blossom bushels.
  • The Firefly, spawns in the mangrove swamp and normal swamp as a glowing ambient mob.

 

 Made using MCreator
